endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}/incidents
endpoints.description: Gets a list of incidents associated to an alert rule
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/alertrules/{ruleName}/incidents/{incidentName}
endpoints.description: Gets an incident associated to an alert rule
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{INCIDENTNAME}} with a real incidentname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{RULENAME}} with a real rulename.
